classes.description: Start your week with an energizing flow. This class links breath to movement through sun salutations, standing sequences, and gentle inversions. Perfect for waking up the body and setting your intention for the week ahead.
A challenging midday practice designed to build strength and endurance. Expect arm balances, core work, and dynamic sequences that will have you feeling energized for the rest of the day.
Slow down and let gravity do the work. Holding poses for 3-5 minutes to target deep connective tissue, this class is the perfect antidote to a long Monday. Props provided and encouraged.

The traditional Ashtanga primary series led by our founder. This Mysore-style class allows students to work at their own pace within the established sequence. Maya provides individual adjustments and guidance throughout.
Practiced in a room heated to 95°F, this flowing sequence builds serious heat from the inside out. Expect detoxifying twists, deep backbends, and hip openers. Bring a towel and plenty of water.
A creative vinyasa sequence that changes weekly. Alex draws from dance and martial arts to create flows that feel fresh and playful while building strength and flexibility.
A 30-minute guided meditation session to reset your midweek energy. Sam blends Zen techniques with modern mindfulness research. No experience needed — just show up and breathe.

Using bolsters, blankets, and blocks, you'll be fully supported in gentle poses held for 10-15 minutes each. This deeply relaxing practice activates your parasympathetic nervous system, leaving you feeling restored and renewed.
Our most challenging class. Combines yoga with bodyweight strength training — think chaturanga push-ups, chair pose holds, and crow pose transitions. Not for the faint of heart, but deeply rewarding.
Gentle movement and breathwork designed specifically for expecting parents. Focus on relieving common pregnancy discomforts, building pelvic floor strength, and connecting with your changing body.

Flow by candlelight in this atmospheric evening class. Maya guides you through a slow, intentional vinyasa sequence that builds toward deep hip openers and gentle inversions. The perfect way to close out your day.

Also known as 'yogic sleep,' this guided relaxation technique takes you through progressive stages of consciousness. Lying comfortably, you'll experience deep rest equivalent to several hours of sleep in just 45 minutes.
End your work week with some serious heat. This power-meets-hot-yoga hybrid will wring out every last bit of tension from the week. Expect to leave drenched, detoxified, and deeply satisfied.

Our signature weekend class — welcoming, inclusive, and perfect for all bodies. Maya creates a warm community atmosphere with partner work, group breathing, and a flowing sequence accessible to complete beginners.

A longer meditation session with minimal guidance. After a brief introduction and body scan, Sam holds space for 40 minutes of silent sitting. Suitable for practitioners with some meditation experience.

The best of both worlds — start with 45 minutes of active vinyasa to generate heat and energy, then wind down with 45 minutes of deep yin poses. This balanced practice prepares your body and mind for the week ahead.

Explore the transformative power of conscious breathing. Sam guides you through various pranayama techniques — from calming alternate nostril breathing to energizing kapalabhati. Close your weekend with clarity and calm.
